verification_gate: Each promoted plane LPS-023 through LPS-027 resolves to a task-graph row with a proof_uri; execution-templates seed verified; beads and prompt_hub linkage recorded as steps not inventory; planning-spine:verify green.
proof_summary: LPS-028 explicitly depends on LPS-023 through LPS-027 all being closed (each promoted plane must resolve to a task-graph row with a PASSING proof_uri) before the fleet loop-spine inventory GAP can be closed. In this pass LPS-023 (GitKB plane) and LPS-024 (hf seam) are proven PASS, but LPS-025 (rusty-idd, 6 red gate elements), LPS-026 (meta git PR-cut flow, needs commit-authorized session), and LPS-027 (release-please dry-run, tool not installed) are only PARTIAL. Therefore the LPS-028 closure gate is not satisfiable yet. No wiring artifact (generated/fleet_loop_wiring.json), execution-templates seed verification, or beads/prompt_hub step-linkage was authored, per the row's own precondition and this lane's instruction to attempt LPS-028 only if 023..027 all close. The chain also waits on the envctl parallel session to clear (row next_action).

blockers.gate: Each promoted plane LPS-023..027 resolves to a row with a passing proof_uri
blockers.detail: LPS-025 partial (fmt/test/clippy/audit/merge-tools/spec-status red — see LPS-025.proof.json blockers), LPS-026 partial (branch/PR write flow needs commit-authorized session), LPS-027 partial (release-please not installed). Until these three are PASS, LPS-028 cannot close.
blockers.owner_action: Close LPS-025 source/dep fixes (schema.yaml dedup, tree-sitter ABI, clippy collapse, cargo fmt, cargo-audit install, merge-tools allowed-surface), run the LPS-026 branch/PR flow in a commit-authorized session, and run the LPS-027 release-please dry-run; then author generated/fleet_loop_wiring.json + beads/prompt_hub step linkage and run planning-spine:verify.
